spurious_features.label: -ly words with 'odd/strange'
spurious_features.reason: Lexical pattern from 'strangest'; no contradiction meaning.

causal_features.label: reverse/inverse/vice versa
causal_features.reason: Directly encodes reversal, a semantic contradiction cue.

causal_features.label: role in systems
causal_features.reason: Semantic role/relation feature tied to meaning.

causal_features.label: artistic elements breaking guidelines
causal_features.reason: Higher-level semantic abstraction from role/reversal signals.

causal_features.label: reversals of fortune
causal_features.reason: Integrates reversal concept at a semantic level.

other_features.label: negations and Chinese names
other_features.reason: Negation detector is not claimed relevant to this example.

notes: Oracle claims both semantic and spurious signals; causal features outnumber spurious ones.
